steps.assistant_text: Kernel PI-event send_mesg (inlined libultra: dispatch to __osEventStateTab[8]/OS_EVENT_PI + __osPopThread/__osEnqueueThread wake). No donor needed — 5.3=7.1 at -O1 and the host TU is already -O1. The 'pure register-coloring residual' fell to a 4-lever -O1 kit: local-struct-member pointers (sp-resident at -O1); if(1){} FIRST-body-statement barrier (kills cross-BB forwarding, forces body-entry reloads); block-scope plain s32 last (single home store + reuse); register void *t (colors s0, no slot).

metadata.verification: 59/59 word-exact (53 literal + 6 reloc slots) + make ROM byte-identical
